name: Oreo Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups reduced Fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
1/4 cup Reese's Pieces® peanut butter candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 14-inch pizza pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. Prepare brownie mix batter according to package directions; stir in cookie crumbs. Spread batter in prepared pan.
4. Bake for 18 minutes or until done.
5. Sprinkle marshmallows over top of hot brownie. Bake for 3 more minutes or until marshmallows are lightly browned.
6. Sprinkle with nuts and candy, pressing lightly into softened marshmallows.
7. Cool slightly on wire rack.
